name: Crockpot Orange Honey Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the frozen chicken breasts in the crockpot.
2. Mix together 1/2 cup orange juice, 1/2 cup chicken broth, 1/4 cup honey, 1 tablespoon dry mustard, and 1 tablespoon teriyaki sauce.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken in the crockpot.
4. Cook on low for four hours.
5. Add the vegetables (broccoli florets, cauliflower florets, carrot "pennies") about one hour before serving.
6. Place the vegetables on top of the chicken and do not stir.
7. Continue cooking for an additional hour until done.
8. Serve over rice.
If using non-frozen chicken breasts, subtract at least one hour from the cooking time.
